CustomField.description: Default maintenance program that will be used for this aircraft type when required and not set manually Used in MR Comps projects [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: This field is deprecated] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1150819886958569/task/1207126408685378?focus=true Reason - [Tech debt] Deprecate MR Comps component and associated data Version - v54]
